metadata.description: Comprehensive Nigeria geographic and demographic data API
metadata.dataSource: Consolidated from multiple verified Nigerian government and community sources including Britannica, Wikipedia, and NigerianQueries
metadata.note: State logos added from Wikimedia Commons. Postal codes added for all states, LGAs, and towns. Each town now includes a unique 6-digit postal code.
